graphiteType.description:
There are different types of Graphite compatible backends. Here you can specify the type you are using. For Metrictank, this will enable specific features, like query processing meta data. Metrictank
        is a multi-tenant timeseries engine for Graphite and friends.

graphiteVersion.description: This option controls what functions are available in the Graphite query editor.

keepCookies.description: Grafana proxy deletes forwarded cookies by default. Specify cookies by name that should be forwarded to the data source.

oauthPassThru.description: Forward the user's upstream OAuth identity to the data source (Their access token gets passed along).

rollupIndicatorEnabled.description: Shows up as an info icon in panel headers when data is aggregated.

tlsAuthWithCACert.description: Needed for verifying self-signed TLS Certs

url.description: Specify a complete HTTP URL (for example http://your_server:8080)

withCredentials.description: Whether credentials such as cookies or auth headers should be sent with cross-site requests.
